caption: A white Corvette is parked outdoors on a grassy area next to a paved surface. The rear of the car is visible, featuring two red taillights on the left and "CORVETTE" text in two different styles on the right. A Florida license plate reads "192 WTR" with "SUNSHINE STATE" printed along the bottom. A small red, white, and blue logo is centered on the lower bumper. To the left, a golden-brown car door is open. Across the sequence, the camera angle shifts slightly, moving from a closer, higher perspective to a slightly lower and wider view. This shift reveals more of the car's lower bumper and the tow hitch attached to the rear. No people are visible in the frames.
